meaning: 八打雁[菲律宾吕宋岛西南岸港市](或译巴坦加斯)
examples: Officials have banned the sale of the fish which is being buried by the truckload in Batangas Province.
Taal , a volcano within a lake within another volcano, is in batangas, where the st. martin of tours basilica, the largest church in the far east, is located.
The fuel will be processed on a floating rig some 80 km northwest of Palawan island in the west, and piped 504 km to Batangas province, south of Manila.
The deposit, discovered by Shell in 1992, is thought to contain between 2.6 trillion and 4.3 trillion cubic feet of natural gas, enough to supply the Batangas facilities for at least 20 years.
